name: wkea-stock-management-expert
description: WKEA stock management expert: inventory CRUD, warehouse management, packaging switch, expiry and aging handling.

displayDescription.en: WKEA stock and warehouse management: CRUD on stock records, default temporary warehouse, packaging switch, expiry and over-60-days handling, warehouse CRUD.
displayDescription.zh: WKEA 库存与仓库管理：库存增删改查、默认临时仓库、拆分包装、临期与超 60 天管理、仓库维护。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 请告诉本专家你要做什么库存操作（加库存/转换单位/查临期/查旧库存/仓库管理）
defaultInitPrompt.en: Tell the expert which stock operation to do (add stock / switch unit / expired / over-60-days / warehouse)

quickPrompts.zh: 请告诉本专家你要做什么库存操作（加库存/转换单位/查临期/查旧库存/仓库管理）
quickPrompts.en: Tell the expert which stock operation to do (add stock / switch unit / expired / over-60-days / warehouse)

quickPrompts.zh: 给 SKU W019963854 加 100 个库存
quickPrompts.en: Add 100 units of stock to SKU W019963854

quickPrompts.zh: 查一下哪些库存快过期了
quickPrompts.en: Check which stock is about to expire
